name: Sha | The Walten Files |
description:
"When she woke up, she was beautiful. But on the inside, it felt like every single part of her body was BLEEDING..."

Wassup gang, only 4 followers, huh? Well, if I have something that gets your attention, would it be this? Another new precious bot even though they're more than this sexy babe? Well I'm cooking and made a new bot after deciding it was time give you guys something new... Sha. And yes, the chick from that video. (you know what I mean)

Also, don't expect the bot to know everything about the events of Walten Files, as I've tried to put in some events canon from the Walten Files as the best I could. Some might be correct, incorrect, and just made up or something.


Now please, my fellow sigmas, enjoy!

UPDATE 10/9/25: split the introduction into four paragraphs, nothin' serious.
creator: IsoldYABoi
